title: Échange de notes verbales a/s date d'entrée en vigueur de l'accord : note verbale française

pages.text:
Liberte • Egalita • Fraternine

RÉPUBLIQUE FRANÇAISE

EMBASSY OF FRANCE IN KENYA

P.O. Box 41784 00100 Nairobi

D0 ,P97 19010

The Embassy of France in Nairobi presents its compliments to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Kenya and has the honour to request a notification from the Ministry of the entry into force of both the reciprocal promotion and protection of investments agreement, signed on the 4** of

December 2007, and the convention for the avoidance of double taxation with respect to air transport, signed on the 12" of January of 1996 between the Government of the Republic of Kenya and the

Government of the Republic of France.

According to its terms, the first agreement (investment protection) "shall enter into force one month after the date of the final notification" (art. 14). Knowing that the last notification has been issued on the 3* of December 2009 by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Kenya (Verbal Note MFA.TRA. 18/8), and following our notification's transmission occurred on the 23" of

June (Verbal note ref. number 274), we then consider this agreement's entry into force from the 3"d of

January of 2010.

On the other hand, the convention for the avoidance of double taxation with respect to air transports "shall enter into force on the date on which the later of those notifications has been received" (art. 8). In the same way, the Kenya Government notification has been received on the 14th of January 2010 (verbal note MFA. TRA 18/8) by the French Embassy in Kenya, and following our instrument transmission occurred on the 17" of August 2007 (verbal note MFA/330/07). We shall therefore consider that the mentioned convention entered into force on the 14" of January 2010.

Consequently, the Embassy of France has the honour to request a verbal note from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Kenya to confirm the mentioned dates' of entries into force of both agreements.

The Embassy of France avails itself of this opportunity to renew to the Ministry of Foreign

Affairs of the Republic of Kenya the assurances of its highest consideration./.

DE

FRANC

Mairobi: 28 May 2010

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

= PROTOCOLE DIVISION =

= EUROPE DIVISION =

NAIROBI

CC : TO MR. KIHWAGA, HEAD OF LEGAL DIVISION

Barclays Plaza - 9" Floor - Loita Street

PO Box 41784 - 00100 NAIROBI

Tel: 254 (20) 277 80 00 - fax: 254 (20) 277 81 80 ambafrance.nairobi@diplomatie.gouv.fr
